context: Name of the to be translated language

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

translation: Cleachd "@e" gus amas a chur air a h-uile eintiteas
Cleachd "@a" gus amas a chur air a h-uile cluicheadair
Cleachd "@p" gus amas a chur air a' chluicheadair as fhaisge

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Feumaidh comas cealgaireachd a bhith air a' chluicheadair sa mhodh chruthachail

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Chan eil blocaichean-àithne an comas air an fhrithealaiche seo
Cleachd "@r" gus amas a chur air chluicheadair air thuaiream
Cleachd "@s" gus amas a chur air an eintiteas a tha a' dèanamh na h-àithne
Suidhich àithne a' chonsoil airson a' bhloca
Cuir do làmh ris is dùin e

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: An aire! An dèidh dhut do làmh a chur ris an leabhar, cha ghabh e deasachadh tuilleadh.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
translation: Chan fhaodar togail nas àirde na %s
Chan urrainn brath cabadaich a chur

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson an làrach-lìn seo fhosgladh?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: A bheil thu airson an ceangal seo fhosgladh no a chur dhan stòr-bhòrd?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Na fosgail ceangal idir o neach anns nach eil earbsa agad!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Chan eil cluicheadair air loidhne leis a' bhàr-bhòs ghnàthaichte %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d

translation: Chaidh milleadh %s a chur an sàs ann an %s

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Cha do dh'atharraicheadh dad. Chan eil an cluicheadair na cheannard
Chuireadh %s à ròl ceannard an fhrithealaiche
Cha do lìonadh bloca sam bith
Chaidh am modh geama aig %s a shuidheachadh air %s

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: Tha an %s as fhaisge aig %s (%s blocaichean air falbh)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: Tha an %s as fhaisge aig %s (%s blocaichean bhuat)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Cha do dh'atharraicheadh dad. Tha an cluicheadair na cheannard mu thràth
Cha b' urrainn dhuinn an geama ionadail òstadh

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.

translation: Chaidh an sàbhaladh fèin-obrachail a chur à comas
Chaidh an sàbhaladh fèin-obrachail a chur an comas

source_string: There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Tha an sgòr %2$s aig %1$s a thaobh an amais %3$s
Shuidhicheadh a' phuing-ghintinn dha %4$s cluicheadairean air %1$s, %2$s, %3$s
A' cur stad air an fhrithealaiche
Cha ghabhadh an t-eintiteas a thairm

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Tha an taga sin air an amas mu thràth no tha cus tagaichean air

source_string: Target does not have this tag
translation: Chan eil an taga seo air an amas

source_string: Failed to connect to the server
translation: Dh’fhàillig le ceangal ris an fhrithealaiche
Sgrìobhaidh seo thairis air na roghainnean làithreach
agad agus cha ghabh seo neo-dhèanamh.
Sgèile X air tuaireamachd na doimhne
Sgèile Z air tuaireamachd na doimhne
Roghainnean adhartach a bharrachd (do shàr-eòlaichean a-mhàin!)

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Air neo tagh fear a rinn sinn na bu tràithe!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: A bheil thu airson an ro-sheata agad a roinn le cuideigin? Cleachd am bogsa gu h-ìosal!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
%1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: Bhuail %1$s ann an cactas agus e/i a' feuchainn ri teicheadh o %2$s
Chaidh %1$s a bhàthadh agus e/i a' teicheadh o %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: Choisich %1$s a-steach dhan teine agus e/i a' sabaid ri %2$s
Dh'fheuch %1$s ri snàmh ann an làbha

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: Dh'fheuch %1$s ri snàmh ann an làbha agus e/i a' teicheadh o %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: Dh'fhàgadh %1$s na smàl agus e/i a' sabaid ri %2$s
Fhuair %1$s bàs a' feuchainn ri %2$s a leòn

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: Dh'fhuaigheadh %1$s le caisean-snighe 's e a' tuiteam

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: Thuit %1$s ro fhada is chuir %2$s às dha

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: Thuit %1$s ro fhada is chuir %2$s às dha le %3$s
B' e tuiteam bha an dàn dha %1$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson fàgail?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Mairidh an saoghal-taisbeanaidh seo còig làithean-geama. Dèan do dhìcheall!
Seo an latha mu dheireadh agad!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Tha an còigeamh latha agad seachad. Cleachd %s gus glacadh-sgrìn dhe na chruthaich thu a shàbhaladh.
Tha an ùine gu bhith falbh ort!
Dh’fhalbh an ùine air an demo!

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Mairidh an saoghal-taisbeanaidh seo fad 5 làithean-geama (mu uair is 40 mionaid de dh’fhìor-ùine). Thoir sùil air na h-adhartachaidhean airson oidheaman! Gum meal thu do thuras!
Cleachd %1$s gus an tasgadh agad fhosgladh

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Cleachd %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s agus an luchag airson gluasad
Seall mun cuairt leis an luchag

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Dh’fhalbh an ùine air an demo. Ceannaich an geama gus leantainn air adhart no tòisich air saoghal ùr!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson duilgheas an t-saoghail seo a ghlasadh? Thèid an saoghal seo a shuidheachadh air %1$s gu buan agus chan urrainn dhut atharrachadh a-rithist.
Chaidh an ceangal a bhriseadh leis an fhrithealaiche

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Seisean mì-dhligheach (Feuch ath-thòiseachadh a' gheama agus an lòinseir)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Chan eil na frithealaichean dearbhaidh rin ruighinn an-dràsta. Am feuch thu a-rithist?
Fhuaras a' bhròg ri linn spama

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson am frithealaiche seo a thoirt air falbh?

source_string: Scanning for games on your local network
translation: A' sganadh airson gheamannan air an lìonra ionadail agad
Sàbhail agus falbh dhan phrìomh sgrìn
Nì muinntir a' bhaile ath-stocachadh suas ri dà uair san latha.
Thàinig %s (air an robh %s roimhe seo) a-steach dhan gheama

source_string: This server recommends the use of a custom resource pack.
translation: Tha am frithealaiche seo a' moladh gun cleachd thu pacaid-ghoireasan ghnàthaichte.

source_string: Would you like to download and install it automagically?
translation: Am bu toigh leat a luchdadh a-nuas 's a stàladh gu fèin-obrachail?

source_string: Language translations may not be 100% accurate
translation: Dh'fhaodte nach bi na h-eadar-theangachaidhean gu tur pongail
Deoch-thilgidh gu seasamh an aghaidh teine
Deoch-fhuireachd gu seasamh an aghaidh teine

source_string: Splash Potion of the Turtle Master
Lingering Potion of the Turtle Master
Item can't be upgraded this way
translation: Chan urrainnear an nì ùrachadh san dòigh seo

source_string: The default Minecraft graphics, now updated with stylish new textures!

translation: Cha b' urrainn an glacadh-sgrìn a shàbhaladh: %s

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson am frithealaiche seo a thoirt air falbh?

source_string: will be lost forever! (A long time!)
Are you sure you want to delete this world?
translation: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson an saoghal seo a sguabadh às?

source_string: will be lost forever! (A long time!)
Same as survival mode, but blocks can't
translation: Dìreach mar am modh maireachdainn, ach chan fhaodar blocaichean
a chur ris no a thoirt air falbh
Stòrasan gun chrìoch, itealach saor agus

source_string: Same as survival mode, locked at hardest
translation: Dìreach mar am modh maireachdainn, ach glaiste aig an ìre as duilghe
as dorra. agus le aon bheatha a-mhàin

source_string: You can look but don't touch
translation: Chì thu a h-uile càil ach cha bhean thu ri dad
Lorg goireasan, dèan obair-chiùird, faigh buannachd

source_string: Leave blank for a random seed
translation: Fàg bàn e airson sìol air thuaiream
Cluich san t-saoghal a thagh thu
Uisge air a thogail o choire
Blocaichean leigeil às air an rùrachadh

source_string: You have never been killed by %s

translation: Nithean air an cur fo gheasaibh
Saighead gu seasamh an aghaidh teine

source_string: Prefix, %s%2$s again %s and %1$s lastly %s and also %1$s again!
translation: Ro-leasachan, %s%2$s, %s a-rithist agus %1$s, %s mu dheireadh thall agus %1$s a-rithist cuideachd!

source_string: You've been playing for greater than 24 hours
translation: Tha thu air a bhith a’ cluich airson còrr air 24 uairean

source_string: Excessive gaming may interfere with normal daily life
translation: Faodaidh cus gèam bacadh a chur air beatha làitheil àbhaisteach

source_string: The default Minecraft graphics, now updated with stylish new textures!
The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: Tha an %s as fhaisge aig %s (%s blocaichean air falbh)
Leig às an nì a thagh thu
